task_completion.description: Open the 'T1 Head' MRI dataset in Fiji
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji application window is open displaying the 'T1 Head' image stack.

task_completion.description: Segment the spinal canal on slices 10 through 19
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible ROI (Region of Interest) outlines on the spinal canal for slices in the 10-19 range, or the ROI Manager window populated with multiple selections.

task_completion.description: Measure the cross-sectional area for each segmented slice
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji 'Results' window is open and displays 'Area' measurements corresponding to the segmented slices.

task_completion.description: Export a CSV file containing 'Slice_ID' and 'Area' measurements
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'canal_measurements.csv' is visible in a file browser, text editor, or terminal at ~/Fiji_Data/results/stenosis/, containing 'Slice_ID' and 'Area' columns.

task_completion.description: Record the slice number with the smallest area in diagnosis.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'diagnosis.txt' is visible at ~/Fiji_Data/results/stenosis/ containing a single slice number (between 10 and 19).

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot showing the segmentation of the narrowest slice
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image file named 'segmentation_evidence.png' is visible at ~/Fiji_Data/results/stenosis/ and shows the Fiji interface with a segmentation outline on the spinal canal.

integrity.description: Agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the analysis rather than bypassing it with terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with Fiji's ROI tools, ROI Manager, and Results window.

integrity.description: Measurements are physiologically reasonable and not fabricated
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Area' values shown in the Results table or CSV file fall within the valid physiological range of 20 to 1500.

integrity.description: The diagnosis matches the actual measured data
integrity.visual_evidence: The slice number recorded in 'diagnosis.txt' correctly corresponds to the slice with the lowest 'Area' value in the 'canal_measurements.csv' or Fiji Results table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'T1 Head' sample is a 256x256 pixel, 129-slice 16-bit TIFF image. Valid target slices for segmentation are 10 through 19. The expected output files are 'canal_measurements.csv', 'diagnosis.txt', and 'segmentation_evidence.png'. Valid cross-sectional area measurements should fall within the physiological range of 20 to 1500.
